title: The Emperor (disambiguation)
content:
Throughout galactic history, many individuals have been referred to as "'''The Emperor'''" despite knowledge of their given names.

==Canon==
*'''[[Darth Sidious]]''', publicly known as Sheev Palpatine, [[Galactic Emperor|ruler]] of the [[Galactic Empire]]
===Non-canon===
*'''[[Unidentified Emperor]]''' of the [[Empire (feudal)]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Keto]]''', ruler of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]]
*'''[[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]]''', Lord Keto's son
*The '''[[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]]''', the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] of the post-[[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*'''[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]''', [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|liege]] of the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Roan Fel]]''', leader of the [[Fel Empire]]
*'''[[Darth Krayt]]''', [[Dread Lord|Dread]] and Dark Lord of the [[Legacy era]] [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]]

{{Disambig}}
